metadata.curriculum: Cambridge International AS & A Level Chemistry (9701)
metadata.description: A-Level Chemistry topics with prerequisite ordering, colored by component
sources: Cambridge International AS & A Level Chemistry 9701 Syllabus

nodes.label: Relative Masses
nodes.description: Relative atomic mass, relative molecular mass, relative formula mass and their determination from mass spectra

nodes.label: The Mole & Avogadro Constant
nodes.description: The mole, Avogadro constant, molar mass, calculations involving reacting masses

nodes.label: Empirical & Molecular Formulae
nodes.description: Determining empirical and molecular formulae from experimental data and percentage composition

nodes.label: Chemical Equations & Stoichiometry
nodes.description: Balancing equations, ionic equations, stoichiometric calculations including limiting reagents and percentage yield

nodes.label: Solutions & Concentration
nodes.description: Concentration in mol dm⁻³ and g dm⁻³, dilution calculations, volumetric analysis

nodes.label: Ideal Gas Equation
nodes.description: pV = nRT, molar gas volume, calculations involving gas volumes at STP and non-standard conditions

nodes.label: Protons, Neutrons & Electrons
nodes.description: Subatomic particles, atomic number, mass number, isotopes, behaviour in electric fields

nodes.label: Electron Configuration
nodes.description: Shells, sub-shells (s, p, d), orbitals, electron configuration notation, filling order and exceptions

nodes.label: Ionisation Energy
nodes.description: First and successive ionisation energies, trends across periods and down groups, evidence for electron configuration

nodes.label: Ionic Bonding
nodes.description: Formation of ionic bonds, lattice structures, properties of ionic compounds, dot-and-cross diagrams

nodes.label: Covalent Bonding
nodes.description: Single, double, triple covalent bonds, dative (coordinate) bonds, dot-and-cross diagrams, bond energy and bond length

nodes.label: Metallic Bonding
nodes.description: Delocalised electron model, properties of metals explained by metallic bonding

nodes.label: Shapes of Molecules
nodes.description: VSEPR theory, bond pair and lone pair repulsion, predicting shapes and bond angles

nodes.label: Electronegativity & Bond Polarity
nodes.description: Electronegativity, polar bonds, polar and non-polar molecules, bond polarity and molecular dipoles

nodes.label: Intermolecular Forces
nodes.description: Van der Waals forces, permanent dipole-dipole forces, hydrogen bonding and their effects on physical properties

nodes.label: The Gaseous State
nodes.description: Kinetic theory of gases, ideal gas behaviour, deviations from ideal behaviour and real gases

nodes.label: Liquids & Solids
nodes.description: Properties of liquids and solids, types of crystalline solids (ionic, molecular, metallic, giant covalent), melting and boiling points

nodes.label: Enthalpy Changes
nodes.description: Exothermic and endothermic reactions, standard enthalpy changes of reaction, formation, combustion, neutralisation

nodes.label: Calorimetry
nodes.description: Experimental determination of enthalpy changes using q = mcΔT, sources of error in calorimetry

nodes.label: Hess's Law
nodes.description: Hess's law and enthalpy cycles, calculating enthalpy changes using formation and combustion data

nodes.label: Bond Energies
nodes.description: Mean bond enthalpies, using bond energies to calculate enthalpy changes of reaction

nodes.label: Redox Reactions
nodes.description: Oxidation and reduction, oxidation states, identifying redox reactions, half-equations

nodes.label: Electrolysis
nodes.description: Electrolysis of molten and aqueous electrolytes, predicting products, industrial applications, Faraday's laws

nodes.label: Dynamic Equilibrium
nodes.description: Reversible reactions, characteristics of dynamic equilibrium, closed systems

nodes.label: Le Chatelier's Principle
nodes.description: Effect of changes in concentration, pressure and temperature on equilibrium position

nodes.label: Equilibrium Constant Kc
nodes.description: Writing Kc expressions, calculating Kc, effect of conditions on Kc value

nodes.label: Rates of Reaction
nodes.description: Measuring rate of reaction, factors affecting rate (concentration, temperature, surface area, catalysts)

nodes.label: Collision Theory & Activation Energy
nodes.description: Collision theory, activation energy, Maxwell-Boltzmann distribution, effect of temperature and catalysts

nodes.label: Catalysts
nodes.description: Homogeneous and heterogeneous catalysis, enzymes as biological catalysts, industrial catalysts

nodes.label: Periodicity
nodes.description: Trends in atomic radius, ionic radius, ionisation energy, electronegativity, melting points across Period 3

nodes.label: Period 3 Oxides & Chlorides
nodes.description: Reactions of Period 3 elements with oxygen and chlorine, properties of oxides and chlorides, acid-base character

nodes.label: Group 2 Properties & Reactions
nodes.description: Physical and chemical properties of Group 2 elements, reactions with water, oxygen, and acids, trends down the group

nodes.label: Group 2 Compounds
nodes.description: Thermal decomposition of carbonates and nitrates, solubility trends of hydroxides and sulfates, uses of Group 2 compounds

nodes.label: Group 17 Properties & Trends
nodes.description: Physical properties of halogens, trends in electronegativity, boiling point, oxidising ability down the group

nodes.label: Group 17 Reactions & Halide Tests
nodes.description: Displacement reactions of halogens, reactions of halide ions, testing for halide ions with silver nitrate, disproportionation of chlorine

nodes.label: Nitrogen Chemistry
nodes.description: Nitrogen oxides, formation in car engines, catalytic converters, environmental impact of nitrogen compounds

nodes.label: Sulfur Chemistry
nodes.description: Sulfur dioxide and sulfur trioxide, Contact process, sulfuric acid, acid rain and environmental impact

nodes.label: Functional Groups & Nomenclature
nodes.description: Homologous series, IUPAC nomenclature, common functional groups, structural and displayed formulae

nodes.label: Isomerism (Structural & Stereoisomerism)
nodes.description: Structural isomerism (chain, position, functional group), E/Z stereoisomerism, cis-trans isomerism

nodes.label: Reaction Mechanisms (Introduction)
nodes.description: Homolytic and heterolytic bond fission, free radicals, nucleophiles, electrophiles, curly arrow notation

nodes.label: Alkanes
nodes.description: Structure and properties of alkanes, combustion, free radical substitution with halogens, petroleum and cracking

nodes.label: Alkenes
nodes.description: Structure, electrophilic addition reactions (HBr, H₂O, Br₂), test for unsaturation, Markovnikov's rule

nodes.label: Addition Polymerisation
nodes.description: Formation of addition polymers from alkenes, structure of poly(ethene) and poly(chloroethene), disposal issues

nodes.label: Halogenoalkanes
nodes.description: Classification (primary, secondary, tertiary), nucleophilic substitution (SN1 and SN2 mechanisms), hydrolysis rates

nodes.label: Elimination Reactions
nodes.description: Elimination of HX from halogenoalkanes to form alkenes, competition between substitution and elimination

nodes.label: CFCs & the Ozone Layer
nodes.description: Uses of halogenoalkanes, CFCs and ozone depletion, free radical mechanism in the stratosphere

nodes.label: Alcohols
nodes.description: Classification, physical properties, hydrogen bonding, reactions: combustion, oxidation, dehydration, esterification

nodes.label: Oxidation of Alcohols
nodes.description: Oxidation of primary alcohols to aldehydes and carboxylic acids, secondary alcohols to ketones, use of acidified dichromate

nodes.label: Aldehydes & Ketones
nodes.description: Structure and naming, nucleophilic addition with HCN, reduction to alcohols, testing with Tollens' and Fehling's reagents

nodes.label: Carboxylic Acids
nodes.description: Structure, naming, physical properties, acidity, reactions with metals, bases, carbonates and alcohols (esterification)

nodes.label: Esters
nodes.description: Formation from carboxylic acids and alcohols, naming, hydrolysis (acid and base), uses of esters

nodes.label: Further Atomic Structure
nodes.description: Electron configuration of d-block elements and ions, orbital energy level diagrams, electron spin

nodes.label: Lattice Energy
nodes.description: Lattice energy definition, factors affecting lattice energy (ionic charge, ionic radius)

nodes.label: Born-Haber Cycles
nodes.description: Constructing Born-Haber cycles, electron affinity, enthalpy of atomisation, calculating lattice energy from cycle

nodes.label: Ion Polarisation
nodes.description: Polarising power and polarisability, comparison of theoretical and experimental lattice energies, degree of covalent character

nodes.label: Enthalpy of Solution & Hydration
nodes.description: Enthalpy of solution, enthalpy of hydration, relationship between lattice energy, hydration enthalpy and solubility

nodes.label: Entropy
nodes.description: Entropy concept, predicting sign of entropy change, standard entropy values, calculating ΔS for reactions

nodes.label: Gibbs Free Energy
nodes.description: ΔG = ΔH − TΔS, predicting spontaneity, temperature dependence of feasibility

nodes.label: Standard Electrode Potentials
nodes.description: Standard hydrogen electrode, measuring electrode potentials, standard cell potential E°cell

nodes.label: Electrochemical Cells
nodes.description: Galvanic cells, cell diagrams, calculating EMF, predicting feasibility of reactions from electrode potentials

nodes.label: Equilibrium Constant Kp
nodes.description: Kp expressions for gaseous equilibria, mole fractions, partial pressures, calculating Kp

nodes.label: Bronsted-Lowry Acid-Base Theory
nodes.description: Bronsted-Lowry definitions, conjugate acid-base pairs, strong vs weak acids and bases

nodes.label: pH Calculations
nodes.description: pH = −log[H⁺], calculating pH of strong acids, strong bases, weak acids using Ka, ionic product of water Kw

nodes.label: Buffer Solutions
nodes.description: Acidic and basic buffers, how buffers work, calculating pH of buffer solutions, biological importance

nodes.label: Titration Curves & Indicators
nodes.description: pH titration curves for strong/weak acid-base combinations, selecting appropriate indicators, equivalence point

nodes.label: Solubility Product Ksp
nodes.description: Ksp expressions and calculations, predicting precipitation, common ion effect on solubility

nodes.label: Partition Coefficients
nodes.description: Partition coefficient, calculations involving distribution of a solute between two immiscible solvents

nodes.label: Rate Equations
nodes.description: Rate equation rate = k[A]^m[B]^n, order of reaction (zero, first, second), overall order, rate constant k

nodes.label: Concentration-Time & Rate-Concentration Graphs
nodes.description: Deducing order from graphs, half-life method for first order, initial rates method

nodes.label: Rate-Determining Step & Mechanisms
nodes.description: Multi-step mechanisms, rate-determining step, deducing mechanisms from rate equations

nodes.label: Arrhenius Equation
nodes.description: k = Ae^(−Ea/RT), determining Ea from graph of ln k vs 1/T, effect of temperature on rate constant

nodes.label: Transition Elements
nodes.description: Definition, electron configurations of d-block elements and ions, variable oxidation states, coloured compounds, catalytic activity

nodes.label: Complex Ions
nodes.description: Coordinate bonding in complexes, coordination number, shapes (octahedral, tetrahedral, square planar, linear), naming complexes

nodes.label: Colour of Transition Metal Complexes
nodes.description: d-orbital splitting, absorption of visible light, factors affecting colour (oxidation state, ligand, coordination number)

nodes.label: Ligand Substitution Reactions
nodes.description: Ligand exchange reactions, stability constants, chelate effect, examples with Cu²⁺ and Co²⁺ complexes

nodes.label: Redox Reactions & Titrations
nodes.description: Redox titrations involving Fe²⁺/MnO₄⁻ and other systems, calculations, use of transition metals as redox reagents

nodes.label: Optical Isomerism
nodes.description: Chiral centres, enantiomers, optical activity, plane-polarised light, racemic mixtures

nodes.label: Arenes (Benzene)
nodes.description: Structure of benzene, delocalisation, electrophilic substitution (nitration, halogenation, Friedel-Crafts alkylation/acylation)

nodes.label: Phenol
nodes.description: Acidity of phenol, reactions with sodium and sodium hydroxide, bromination, comparison with alcohols and carboxylic acids

nodes.label: Acyl Chlorides
nodes.description: Reactions of acyl chlorides with water, alcohols, amines and phenols to form carboxylic acids, esters, amides

nodes.label: Carboxylic Acid Derivatives
nodes.description: Acid anhydrides, esters (further reactions), transesterification, biodiesel production

nodes.label: Amines
nodes.description: Primary, secondary, tertiary amines, preparation from halogenoalkanes and nitriles, basicity, reactions as nucleophiles

nodes.label: Amides
nodes.description: Formation from acyl chlorides and amines, hydrolysis of amides, reduction to amines

nodes.label: Amino Acids & Proteins
nodes.description: Structure of amino acids, zwitterions, isoelectric point, peptide bonds, protein structure, hydrolysis of proteins

nodes.label: Nitriles
nodes.description: Preparation from halogenoalkanes, hydrolysis to carboxylic acids, reduction to amines, chain-length extension

nodes.label: Condensation Polymerisation
nodes.description: Polyesters from diols and dicarboxylic acids, polyamides from diamines and dicarboxylic acids, nylon and Terylene

nodes.label: Polymers & Biodegradability
nodes.description: Comparison of addition and condensation polymers, hydrolysis of polyesters and polyamides, biodegradability, disposal

nodes.label: Organic Synthesis
nodes.description: Multi-step synthesis routes, choice of reagents, planning synthetic pathways, functional group interconversions

nodes.label: Mass Spectrometry
nodes.description: Principles of mass spectrometry, molecular ion peak, fragmentation patterns, determining molecular formula

nodes.label: Infrared Spectroscopy
nodes.description: Absorption of IR radiation, characteristic absorptions of functional groups (O-H, N-H, C=O, C-O), interpreting IR spectra

nodes.label: NMR Spectroscopy
nodes.description: ¹H and ¹³C NMR, chemical shift, integration, splitting patterns, TMS reference, interpreting spectra to determine structure

nodes.label: Chromatography
nodes.description: Thin-layer, column, and gas chromatography, Rf values, interpreting chromatograms, applications in analysis

nodes.label: Combined Analytical Techniques
nodes.description: Using mass spectrometry, IR and NMR data together to determine the structure of an unknown organic compound
